title: Mission Control expands into a full operator workspace
summary: This release rounded out the product with orchestration, a local knowledge base, report generation, and richer extension workflows.

added: Knowledge Base with local file indexing, chunk search, and agent context attachments
Orchestrate page for fan-out research, parallel reviews, and consensus workflows
Reports builder with PDF, CSV, and JSON exports
Extension developer mode with scaffold generation, manifest validation, and live logs
improved: Extensions and skills were unified into a cleaner Extensions experience
Notification Center now supports in-app history, desktop notifications, and unread badges
Prompt Library gained version history, import/export, and agent handoff support
fixed: Security hardening for local auth bootstrap, instance URL validation, and vault storage
Dashboard and analytics fallbacks now render useful data in disconnected/demo mode

title: Mission Control becomes configurable and collaborative
summary: This release focused on reusable workflows, shared sessions, and more polished operator controls.

added: Theme Engine with Dark Glass, Midnight, and Light presets
Agent-to-Agent Chat for collaborative goal-driven conversations
Session sharing as JSON or standalone HTML for handoffs and replay import
Agent Templates for deploying common roles like Code Review and Research Assistant
improved: Keyboard shortcuts now live in dedicated settings pages with better discoverability
Replay tooling became richer and more useful for post-run analysis
fixed: Authentication and key-vault handling were tightened for desktop-only workflows
Command palette routing was cleaned up for the growing app surface

title: Mission Control grows beyond the dashboard
summary: This release introduced the larger monitoring and automation surface that turned Mission Control into a true ops console.

added: Cost Dashboard with session-level token tracking and budget alerts
Scheduled Tasks with cron expressions, run history, and background execution
Extensions marketplace, replay tooling, and notifications history
Analytics, benchmarks, audit log, and persistent prompt management
improved: Command palette and sidebar expanded to cover the full workspace
Offline/demo states now make more pages useful before OpenClaw is connected
fixed: Settings and data fallbacks were normalized across API routes
Plugin parsing now reflects real OpenClaw output instead of mangled placeholders

title: Mission Control launches
summary: The first public release shipped the desktop dashboard, live status views, mode switching, and the baseline connection flow.

added: Desktop Mission Control shell for OpenClaw operators
Dashboard with status cards, activity feed, and quick links
Connection setup flow for OpenClaw URL, password, and OpenRouter key
Mode switching and baseline cost controls
improved: License activation and updater flows became reliable across Windows installs
fixed: Windows updater naming and installer feed issues
Legacy license recovery and activation edge cases
